purpose: Fast project orientation for future agents. Read this before broad repo exploration when you only need core features and subsystem shape.

project.name: tmux-intray
project.summary: Go CLI + TUI notification inbox for tmux, centered on persistent contextual messages and fast navigation back to the pane that produced them.

core_features: Capture notifications/messages from panes, scripts, and tools via CLI
Persist notifications in SQLite across tmux/session restarts
List, filter, search, and format notifications for shell pipelines
Preserve source context: pane, window, and session metadata
Jump back to the originating tmux pane/window/session
Manage inbox state: mark-read, dismiss, clear, cleanup
Expose unread/total status for tmux status bar integration
Provide interactive TUI for browsing and acting on notifications

architecture.cmd: CLI command surface built with Cobra
architecture.internal/tmux: tmux client integration and context handling
architecture.internal/hooks: Lifecycle extension points around notification events
architecture.internal/tui/state: Largest subsystem; Bubble Tea state and behavior

design_signals: clear separation of domain, storage, tmux, and tui
recommended_next_ast_queries: ast_map on internal/ excluding tests if you need runtime shape only
trace add -> store -> list -> jump flow
inspect package dependencies around internal/core, internal/storage/sqlite, internal/tmux, internal/tui
